title: Section 57
content: No information relating to any enterprise, being an information which has been obtained by or on behalf of 1[the Commission or the Appellate Tribunal] for the purposes of this Act, shall, without the previous permission in writing of the enterprise, be disclosed otherwise than in compliance with or for the purposes of this Act or any other law for the time being in force.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 39 of 2007, s. 44, for "the Commission" (w.e.f. 12-10-2007)
